ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation or code for the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., state, district) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "party_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the party (e.g., D, R) */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the current leader of the party */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party (e.g., liberal, conservative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the party record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the party record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "congress" (
  "congress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congress */,
  "congress_number" INTEGER /* Number of the congress */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the congress */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the congress */,
  "president" TEXT /* Name of the president during the congress */,
  "vice_president" TEXT /* Name of the vice president during the congress */,
  "speaker" TEXT /* Name of the Speaker of the House during the congress */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the congress record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the congress record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("congress_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the result is recorded */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party for which the result is recorded */,
  "congress_id" INTEGER /* ID of the congress for which the result is recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "seats_won" INTEGER /* Number of seats won by the party in the region */,
  "percent_voted" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the party in the region */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the region for the election */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who cast their votes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the election result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the election result record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_congress_id FOREIGN KEY ("congress_id") REFERENCES congress ("congress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_result_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result detail */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result to which the detail belongs */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "votes_received" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate (e.g., male, female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate at the time of the election */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the election result detail record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the election result detail record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_result_details_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., query, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date of query execution */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query execution in seconds */,
  "query_result_size" INTEGER /* Size of the query result in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the query record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of import */,
  "import_file" TEXT /* Name of the file imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "import_duration" REAL /* Duration of the import in seconds */,
  "import_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows imported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data import record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of export */,
  "export_file" TEXT /* Name of the file exported */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "export_duration" REAL /* Duration of the export in seconds */,
  "export_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows exported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data export record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backups" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date of backup */,
  "backup_file" TEXT /* Name of the backup file */,
  "backup_status" TEXT /* Status of the backup (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "backup_duration" REAL /* Duration of the backup in seconds */,
  "backup_size" REAL /* Size of the backup file in megabytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the backup record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date of statistic */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., number of rows, storage size) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_value_numeric" INTEGER /* Numeric value of the statistic */,
  "stat_value_text" TEXT /* Text value of the statistic */,
  "stat_value_date" TEXT /* Date value of the statistic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the database stats record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being validated */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column being validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the validation */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message or error associated with the validation result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the validation record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_cleansing" (
  "cleansing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleansing result */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being cleansed */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column being cleansed */,
  "cleansing_result" TEXT /* Result of the cleansing (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "cleansing_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the cleansing */,
  "cleansing_message" TEXT /* Message or error associated with the cleansing result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cleansing record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleansing_id")
)
